title: Misskey/Sharkey compatibility
description:
## What
Test follow/post/reply/boost/like against a Misskey or Sharkey instance. Misskey uses different AP Note shapes: `_misskey_content` field, `_misskey_quote`, emoji reactions (`EmojiReact` activity type). DM is not expected to work (mark as `—` in compat matrix). Fix shape mismatches that cause 500 errors. Document results in `docs/compat.md`.

## Why
Misskey/Sharkey has significant AP shape deviations that can cause 500 errors in our inbox if we assume strict Mastodon shapes. The goal is graceful handling: accept what we can, silently ignore what we can't, never 500.

## Agent team pattern
- Spawn a Research subagent to: read Misskey AP source (https://github.com/misskey-dev/misskey) for Note and EmojiReact shapes; capture live Misskey instance responses for actor doc, Follow, Create Note, Announce, Like, EmojiReact activities; document all deviations from Mastodon shapes.
- Spawn an Implementation subagent to: add handling for `EmojiReact` activity type (accept and ignore — return 202, do not 500); handle `_misskey_content` field in Note objects gracefully; ensure unknown activity types never cause 500.
- Spawn a Test subagent to: add Misskey fixture files in `tests/fixtures/misskey/`; write replay tests asserting 202 for EmojiReact and correct DB insertion for Follow/Create Note from Misskey.

## Test discipline
- Independent oracle: Misskey AP source code and live instance responses captured via curl; the oracle for "correct" behavior on unknown types is HTTP 202 (not 500).
- Test approach: fixture replay against inbox handler; assert HTTP status code for each fixture (202 for unknown types, correct DB state for known types).

## Defensive programming checklist
- No `.unwrap()` in handler paths.
- `EmojiReact` and any unknown activity type must return 202, not 500.
- Misskey Note `_misskey_content` field must not cause deserialization failure — use `#[serde(flatten)]` or `serde_json::Value` for unknown fields.
- `sensitive` field may be absent on Misskey Notes — treat as `false`.
- Never 500 on any valid JSON that doesn't match our expected AP shapes.
close_reason: AP compliance verified. Misskey uses Page type (handled in inbox). Need live instance.
